caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with text on it. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setting, blending elements of retail and media production.
